title: Henophyton zygarrhenum
taxonomy: Henophyton zygarrhenum is classified as a genus of flowering plants in the family Chenopodiaceae, which is now commonly referred to as the family Amaranthaceae due to ongoing taxonomic revisions. The plant belongs to the order Caryophyllales and is native to certain regions. It is further classified into the subfamily Salsoloideae, which is a subgroup of the Amaranthaceae family. The exact classification of Henophyton zygarrhenum may be subject to change as new research and data become available. Further study is needed to confirm its complete classification within the plant kingdom.
